heading: Omitted
label: 495 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which reserved the Annette Islands for the use of the Metlakahtla Indians, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 561, § 1526 Stat. 1101
